title: Signs of substantial risk of HIV infection ValueSet Display Values
description: Display values for Signs of substantial risk of HIV infection ValueSet ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions. Keys are code fragments (the part after '#' in the canonical IRI). The full IRI can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code.

fhir:displays.description: Multilingual display values for ValueSet codes keyed by code fragment

^.+$.description: Display values for a specific code fragment by language

^[a-z]{2}(-[A-Z]{2})?$.description: Display value in the specified language (ISO 639-1 code)

HIV.E.DE156.en: No condom use during sex with more than one partner in the past 6 months

HIV.E.DE158.en: A sexual partner in the past 6 months had one or more HIV risk factors
